sourcesContent:
import React from "react";
import { Box, Typography, Button, Card, CardContent, Stack } from "@mui/material";

const About = () => {
  return (
    <Box id="About" sx={{ p: 4, textAlign: "center" }}>
      <Box sx={{ maxWidth: 900, mx: "auto" }}>
        <Typography variant="h1" gutterBottom>
          Skills you need today for a successful tomorrow
        </Typography>
        <Typography variant="subtitle1" gutterBottom>
          With our 100% online school and unique teaching method, you'll have the keys to your own success.
        </Typography>
        <Box component="img"
          src="https://oc-assets.imgix.net/modules/sdzv4-main/latest/images/home_banner-16deed9ecd0a8ef5b79c.jpg?auto=compress,format&q=80&w=568"
          alt="Hero Banner"
          sx={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: 568, borderRadius: 2, mt: 2 }}
        />
      </Box>

      <Stack direction={{ xs: "column", md: "row" }} spacing={4} sx={{ mt: 4, justifyContent: "center" }}>
        <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 345, textAlign: "left" }}>
          <CardContent>
            <Typography variant="h3" gutterBottom>
              Students
            </Typography>
            <Typography variant="body1" paragraph>
              Take a big step towards your new career by taking one of our diploma training programs.
            </Typography>
            <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
              <Button variant="contained" color="primary" href="/en/application/welcome?appsource=generic">
                Enroll now
              </Button>
              <Button variant="text" color="primary" href="/en/paths">
                Discover training programs
              </Button>
            </Stack>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card sx={{ maxWidth: 345, textAlign: "left" }}>
          <CardContent>
            <Typography variant="h3" gutterBottom>
              Employers
            </Typography>
            <Typography variant="body1" paragraph>
              Recruit apprentices when you need them and train your teams in practical skills.
            </Typography>
            <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
              <Button variant="contained" color="primary" href="/en/my-organization/overview">
                Explore the employer space
              </Button>
              <Button variant="text" color="primary" href="/en/business">
                Discover business offers
              </Button>
            </Stack>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </Stack>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default About;
